title: Deterministic command resolution and explain planning
outcome: E09.S4 deterministic plan-only resolution: execution_class/runtime_provider on unit + ResolvedCommand schemas; typed entrypoints/profile/policy loaders; full authored TOML on stale/miss; SealedExecutionPlan + PolicyEvaluationInput seam; shared lifecycle CLI path with human/JSON explain; --execute → execution_unavailable; interactive_session → execution_class_unavailable; hermetic resolution_cli matrix (12) + no-process-api source check. No spawn, no RuntimeCommandRecord persistence, no policy evaluation.
validation: moon run takogami:build/test/lint/format-check PASS (24 lib + 17 cli_smoke + 16 contracts + 12 resolution_cli). moon run ontarch:sync/validate PASS (routing projection selfcheck includes execution_class). moon run panoply:gen-check/validate-substrate PASS.
decisions: Add toml crate only for authored-descriptor Serde load; keep S3 provisional string-extract for discovery fallback.
Preserve SCHEMA_VERSION 0.1.0; narrow ResolvedCommand extension for execution_class/runtime_provider.
Lifecycle unit errors map to RESOLUTION exit 4; remapped separately from S3 query exit 2.
MoonTask is explicit compatibility backend (moon not required in tools.json).
Do not implement S5 policy or S6 spawn/records; next_session = E09.S5.
blockers: ontarch:secrets-scan detect mode still reports pre-existing age-secret-key in git history (commit a3a4978) — unchanged; out of E09.S4 scope.
token_note: Loaded STATE + S4 implementation plan + E09.S4 epic block + command-routing + native-toolchain + 2 session records vs full E09 epic and Plan/bin collection.
handoff: E09.S5 must evaluate both (1) the requested runtime-controller operation and (2) the sealed child program/argv/cwd/path plan. S5 must not re-resolve or mutate the S4 SealedExecutionPlan. E09.S6 must consume only a decision-bound Allow plan.
